zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer於1650年10月9日出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 霍福乃拉馬爾斯易特時，他的父親Johann Christoph Beyer29歲，母親Rosina Gaertner24歲。他於1671年與Anna Maria Kuehleisen在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 霍福乃拉馬爾斯易特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1722年7月8日在德國海藍-普法爾茲素德利 維音斯特拉斯格莫斯海姆享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer于1650年10月9日出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 霍福乃拉馬爾斯易特时，他的父亲Johann Christoph Beyer29岁，母亲Rosina Gaertner24岁。他于1671年与Anna Maria Kuehleisen在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 霍福乃拉馬爾斯易特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1722年7月8日在德国海藍-普法爾茲素德利 維音斯特拉斯格莫斯海姆享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ewald, Klaus, Alois, Arno, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Theodor.
German, Scandinavian, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Bayer  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.
Dutch: variant of Beijer, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.
from an agent derivative of Middle High German bāgen ‘to quarrel, to pride oneself’, hence a nickname for a quarrelsome or boastful person.

variants.name: Beyers
meanings: Dutch: variant of Beijers, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomäus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

nameMeanings.name: Christoph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer was born on 9 October 1650, in Marlesreuth, Naila, Hof, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Johann Christoph Beyer, was 29 and his mother, Rosina Gaertner, was 24. He married Anna Maria Kuehleisen in 1671, in Marlesreuth, Naila, Hof, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 July 1722, in Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer est né le 9 octobre 1650, à Marlesreuth, Naila, Landkreis Hof, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Johann Christoph Beyer, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Rosina Gaertner, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anna Maria Kuehleisen en 1671, à Marlesreuth, Naila, Landkreis Hof, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1722, à Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 71 ans.

Er hat 1671 in Marlesreuth, Naila, Landkreis Hof, Bayern, Deutschland Anna Maria Kuehleisen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Juli 1722 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer(이)가 1650년 10월 9일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 호프 나이라 말를레스레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Christoph Beyer(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosina Gaertner(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1671년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 호프 나이라 말를레스레우스에서 Anna Maria Kuehleisen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1722년 7월 8일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 스u들리체 위스트라ss 고머셰임에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1650, em Marlesreuth, Naila, Landkreis Hof, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Christoph Beyer, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Rosina Gaertner, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Maria Kuehleisen em 1671, em Marlesreuth, Naila, Landkreis Hof, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1722, em Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer родился 9 октября 1650 г. в местности марльсреут, неила, ландкрис хоф, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Johann Christoph Beyer было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosina Gaertner, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Maria Kuehleisen в 1671 г. в местности марльсреут, неила, ландкрис хоф, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 июля 1722 г. в местности гоммиршим, сuдлич винстраss, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 71 год.
